   682	
   683	---
   684	
   685	## 8. Tổng hợp file thay đổi
   686	
   687	| # | File | Thay đổi | Dòng |
   688	|---|------|----------|------|
   689	| 1 | `backend/database/migrations/2026_03_29_100000_create_product_target_segments_table.php` | **MỚI** — migration tạo bảng | +50 |
   690	| 2 | `backend/app/Services/V5/Domain/CustomerInsightService.php` | Rewrite `buildUpsellCandidates()`, thêm `buildUpsellProductDetail()`, 3 helper methods | +200 |
   691	| 3 | `backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/V5/CustomerController.php` | Thêm `insightProductDetail()` thin method | +25 |
   692	| 4 | `backend/routes/api/customers.php` | Thêm 1 route GET | +3 |
   693	| 5 | `frontend/types.ts` | Thêm 5 interfaces, mở rộng 1 | +40 |
   694	| 6 | `frontend/services/v5Api.ts` | Thêm `fetchUpsellProductDetail()` | +8 |
   695	| 7 | `frontend/components/CustomerInsightPanel.tsx` | Redesign UpsellTab + UpsellCard + ExpandedDetail + profile bar | +300 |
   696	
   697	**Tổng**: ~626 dòng. **1 file migration mới, 6 file hiện có được sửa.**
   698	
   699	---
   700	
   701	## 9. Caching & Invalidation Strategy (ISSUE-2 fix: complete matrix)
   702	
   703	### 9.1 Cache keys
   704	
   705	| Endpoint | Cache key | TTL |
   706	|----------|-----------|-----|
   707	| `GET /insight` (existing) | `v5:customer-insight:{id}:v1` | 5 phút |
   708	| `GET /insight/product-detail/{pid}` (new) | `v5:customer-insight:{cid}:pd:{pid}:v1` | 10 phút |
   709	
   710	### 9.2 Invalidation matrix — concrete triggers
   711	
   712	**Mechanism duy nhất: Redis `SCAN` + `DEL`** (không dùng `Cache::flush()` hay `Cache::tags()`).
   713	
   714	| Data mutation | Caches to invalidate | Where to call |
   715	|---------------|---------------------|---------------|
   716	| **Customer update** (sector/facility/bed) | `v5:customer-insight:{cid}:v1` + `v5:customer-insight:{cid}:pd:*:v1` | `CustomerDomainService::update()` → `$insightService->invalidateCustomerCaches($cid)` |
   717	| **Contract create/update/delete** | `v5:customer-insight:{customer_id}:v1` + `v5:customer-insight:{customer_id}:pd:*:v1` | `ContractDomainService::store/update/destroy()` → `$insightService->invalidateCustomerCaches($customerId)` |
   718	| **Product update** (name/price/desc) | `v5:customer-insight:*:v1` (all insight — product name/price in upsell) + `v5:customer-insight:*:pd:{pid}:v1` | `ProductDomainService::update()` → `$insightService->invalidateAllInsightCaches()` + `$insightService->invalidateProductDetailCaches($pid)` |
   719	| **Product feature catalog update** | `v5:customer-insight:*:pd:{pid}:v1` | `ProductFeatureCatalogDomainService::save()` → `$insightService->invalidateProductDetailCaches($pid)` |
   720	| **product_target_segments create/update/delete** (any write path) | `v5:customer-insight:*:v1` (all insight — targeted recommendations change) | `$insightService->invalidateAllInsightCaches()` — call from any method that mutates this table (seed, import, future admin CRUD) |
   721	
   722	### 9.3 Implementation — Redis SCAN + DEL (single strategy)
   723	
   724	```php
   725	// Trong CustomerInsightService — 3 concrete methods, tất cả dùng Redis SCAN:
   726	
   727	/**
   728	 * Invalidate insight + all product-detail caches cho 1 customer.
   729	 * Gọi khi customer update hoặc contract mutation.
   730	 */
   731	public function invalidateCustomerCaches(int $customerId): void
   732	{
   733	    Cache::forget("v5:customer-insight:{$customerId}:v1");
   734	    // SCAN pattern: v5:customer-insight:{cid}:pd:*:v1
   735	    $prefix = config('cache.prefix', '') . ':';
   736	    $pattern = "{$prefix}v5:customer-insight:{$customerId}:pd:*:v1";
   737	    $this->redisScanDelete($pattern);
   738	}
   739	
   740	/**
   741	 * Invalidate all product-detail caches chứa productId cụ thể.
   742	 * Gọi khi product update hoặc feature catalog change.
   743	 */
   744	public function invalidateProductDetailCaches(int $productId): void
   745	{
   746	    $prefix = config('cache.prefix', '') . ':';
   747	    $pattern = "{$prefix}v5:customer-insight:*:pd:{$productId}:v1";
   748	    $this->redisScanDelete($pattern);
   749	}
   750	
   751	/**
   752	 * Broad flush tất cả insight caches.
   753	 * Gọi khi product_target_segments bulk seed/import.
   754	 * Self-heal: TTL 5-10 phút sẽ tự expire nếu SCAN miss.
   755	 */
   756	public function invalidateAllInsightCaches(): void
   757	{
   758	    $prefix = config('cache.prefix', '') . ':';
   759	    $pattern = "{$prefix}v5:customer-insight:*";
   760	    $this->redisScanDelete($pattern);
   761	}
   762	
   763	/**
   764	 * Redis SCAN + DEL — non-blocking, cursor-based.
   765	 * An toàn cho production (không block Redis như KEYS *).
   766	 */
   767	private function redisScanDelete(string $pattern): void
   768	{
   769	    $redis = Cache::getRedis();
   770	    $cursor = '0';
   771	    do {
   772	        [$cursor, $keys] = $redis->scan($cursor, ['MATCH' => $pattern, 'COUNT' => 100]);
   773	        if (!empty($keys)) {
   774	            $redis->del(...$keys);
   775	        }
   776	    } while ($cursor !== '0');
   777	}
   778	```
   779	
   780	**Safeguard**: Nếu Redis không available (array driver trong test) → `Cache::forget()` chỉ xóa exact key, pattern-based skip. TTL tự heal.
   781	
   782	---
   783	
   784	## 10. Kiểm tra & Xác nhận (ISSUE-6 fix: explicit test cases)
   785	
   786	### 10.1 Backend regression tests (PHPUnit)
   787	
   788	| # | Test case | Expected | Risky path |
   789	|---|-----------|----------|------------|
   790	| T1 | `testUpsellReturnsTargetedAndPopularGroups` — KH có sector, bảng có data | 2 nhóm: targeted ≥1 + popular | Happy path |
   791	| T2 | `testUpsellFallsBackWhenTargetSegmentsTableMissing` — drop bảng | Tổng 12 items popular, giống behavior cũ | Schema guard |
   792	| T3 | `testUpsellFallsBackWhenCustomerHasNoSector` — customer.sector = NULL | Tổng 12 items popular only | Null sector |
   793	| T4 | `testUpsellGracefulWhenCustomerColumnsAbsent` — thiếu cột facility_type | Match sector only, không crash | Schema guard |
   794	| T5 | `testUpsellMultiMatchPicksDeterministicWinner` — SP match 2 segment rows | `priority` + `sales_notes` từ cùng 1 row | Multi-match |
   795	| T6 | `testUpsellBackwardCompatReferenceCustomers` | `reference_customers: string[]` vẫn có data | Backward compat |
   796	| T7 | `testUpsellDynamicLimitPreservesTotalCount` — 3 targeted + N popular = 12 total | popular_limit = 9 | Fill rule |
   797	| T8 | `testProductDetailReturnsFeatureCatalog` — SP có feature groups | `feature_groups[].features` populated | Detail endpoint |
   798	| T9 | `testProductDetailGracefulWhenFeatureTablesMissing` | `feature_groups: []`, no error | Schema guard |
   799	| T10 | `testProductDetailReturnsSectorCustomers` | `sector_customers[].total_value` > 0 | Detail endpoint |
   800	| T11 | `testInsightCacheInvalidatedOnContractSave` | Cache key deleted after contract create | Cache invalidation |
   801	
   802	### 10.2 Frontend unit tests (Vitest)
   803	
   804	| # | Test case | Expected |
   805	|---|-----------|----------|
   806	| F1 | `testUpsellTabRendersTargetedSection` | Heading "Đề xuất phù hợp" visible |
   807	| F2 | `testUpsellTabRendersPopularSection` | Heading "Sản phẩm phổ biến khác" visible |
   808	| F3 | `testUpsellTabShowsOnlyPopularWhenNoTargeted` | No targeted section, popular full |
   809	| F4 | `testExpandCardLoadsProductDetail` — click "Xem chi tiết" | Feature tree rendered |
   810	| F5 | `testExpandRaceCondition` — expand A, quickly B, A resolves late | B's detail shown (not A) |
   811	| F6 | `testSimilarCustomersBadge` — `is_same_type: true` | Badge "cùng loại" visible |
   812	| F7 | `testCustomerProfileBar` | Profile bar shows correct text |
   813	
   814	### 10.3 Manual verification
   815	
   816	1. **Migration**: `cd backend && php artisan migrate` — verify bảng tạo thành công
   817	2. **Seed data**: Insert test rows vào `product_target_segments` → verify matching
   818	3. **Backend API**: GET `/insight` + GET `/insight/product-detail/{pid}` → verify response shape
   819	4. **Frontend**: "Khách hàng 360" → "Gợi ý bán hàng" → verify 2 nhóm, expand/collapse, race-safe
   820	5. **Type check**: `cd frontend && npm run lint`

item.text: The updated feature-group contract now aligns. I’m doing one last sanity pass on the remaining concrete implementation notes, mainly around the cache-helper API shape, to avoid approving a plan that names a non-existent mechanism.
